Package org.areslib.telemetry

Class WpiLogBackend

java.lang.Object
org.areslib.telemetry.WpiLogBackend
All Implemented Interfaces:
AresLoggerBackend
public class WpiLogBackend extends Object implements AresLoggerBackend
Backend for logging telemetry directly to a .wpilog file. Creates AdvantageScope compatible on-disk logs.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    WpiLogBackend()
    Initializes the WPILog backend to an automatically resolved path.
    WpiLogBackend(String directoryPath)
    Initializes the WPILog backend and creates the initial log file.

  • Constructor Details

    • WpiLogBackend

      public WpiLogBackend()
      Initializes the WPILog backend to an automatically resolved path. It will prioritize mounted USB flash drives first to save internal memory. If no USB is present, it writes to the internal disk at `/sdcard/FIRST/logs/`.

    • WpiLogBackend

      public WpiLogBackend(String directoryPath)
      Initializes the WPILog backend and creates the initial log file.
      Parameters:
      directoryPath - The directory path to store the .wpilog file.

    • update

      public void update()
      Description copied from interface: AresLoggerBackend
      Triggers the backend to flush/send current packets.

      update in interface AresLoggerBackend

    • close

      public void close()
      Closes the underlying log file, flushing any buffered data. Called automatically by AresTelemetry.clearBackends() during OpMode transitions, or manually from AresCommandOpMode.stop() to prevent data loss if the OpMode is force-stopped on the Control Hub.
      Specified by:
      close in interface AresLoggerBackend
